title: Part 7 – Passage unique : annonce de formation en ligne
instructions: Lisez l'annonce, puis répondez aux questions.
passage:
New Online Training: Business English for Professionals

The Learning & Development team is pleased to announce the launch of a new online training course: Business English for Professionals.

This self-paced course is designed for employees whose first language is not English and who wish to improve their written and spoken communication skills in a business context.

Topics covered:
— Writing professional emails
— Participating in meetings and conference calls
— Presenting data and reports
— Negotiating and handling difficult conversations

Duration: Approximately 8 hours, split into 12 modules that can be completed at your own pace.
Access: Log in to the company's Learning Portal and search for 'Business English.'
Cost: Free for all permanent employees.

For more information, contact the L&D team at learning@company.com.

questions.prompt: Who is this course designed for?
choices: Employees whose first language is not English
questions.explanation: "designed for employees whose first language is not English".

questions.prompt: How many modules does the course contain?
questions.explanation: "12 modules that can be completed at your own pace".

questions.prompt: How can employees access the course?
choices: By requesting a DVD from HR
questions.explanation: "Log in to the company's Learning Portal and search for 'Business English.'".

questions.prompt: How much does the course cost for permanent employees?
